utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five items with detailed descriptions. Each item specifies the type of coverage and mentions the cost component (all tied to the €950/month package). Health coverage includes physical and mental health, property coverage is described (though slightly broader), travel coverage is specified, additional services are included, and total budget provides a detailed breakdown. All required elements are present and fully specified according to the requested format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan is described as an 'Executive' package combining multiple premium components: (1) 'Executive health coverage including physical and mental health insurance with stress management programs, family mental health counseling, and pre-existing condition coverage' aligns with the highest-rated physical and mental health options—EliteCare Premium Plan or PrimeCare Premium Plan (both rated 10). (2) 'Executive liability protection and recreation accident coverage' maps to property protection for high-value assets, consistent with EliteHome Premium Coverage (rating 10). (3) 'Enhanced business travel insurance with global medical coverage' corresponds to premium travel plans—PrimeTravel Premium Plan or EliteTravel Premium Plan (rating 10). (4) 'Executive-level enhanced services and concierge benefits' matches the highest-rated general and travel enhancement services such as Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10), Business Travel Support (rating 10), and 24/7 Travel Assistance (rating 10). Therefore, each coverage element corresponds to the top-rated premium options in the ground-truth ratings.
